title: ophrys × monicae
intro: Ophrys × monicae, also known as the Monkey Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys sphegodes. This plant is known for its unique and complex medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × monicae include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential antimicrobial activities. Ophrys × monicae is traditionally prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
